The '''Blacklight Pirates''' were a group of dangerous space [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]].<ref name="SWG:OB" /> Their bases of operations were the [[Blacklight Territory]] in the [[Dantooine system/Legends|Dantooine system]]<ref name="SWG:DS" /> and the [[Onyx Beacon]] in the [[Endor system/Legends|Endor system]].<ref name="SWG:OB" /> They were also actibe in the [[Declorian Territory]] of the Endor system.<ref name="Sony">{{SonyCite|url=en_US/players/content.vm?id=66851&resource=features|text=Star Chart: Endor System}}</ref>

In space battles, they flew [[M3-A Scyk interceptor/Legends|M3-A Scyk fighters]] and [[M12-L Kimogila heavy fighter]]s.<ref name="SWG:DS" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars Galaxies: Jump to Lightspeed]]'' {{1st}}
